summary: Tested BUG1 (future sessions not marked completed) and BUG2 (logged sets persist on tab switch). Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: All 5 tabs load, Today tab logging flow verified, sets persist after tab switch.
critical_code_review_comments: today.tsx has no testID attributes on any interactive elements — makes automated testing harder but does not affect functionality
Tab navigation in web preview renders all tabs simultaneously, so inner_text() captures full DOM rather than just visible tab content. Not a bug, expected Expo web behavior.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing user_a@theprogram.app data. One TEST_Squat log created and deleted during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BUG1 fix verified: /api/calendar/events returns isCompleted=False for all 156 future events. BUG2 fix verified: Logged set (Reverse Hyper set 3, teal checkmark) persisted after switching Home→Today tabs; session count changed from 8/15 to 9/15 and stayed. Home THIS WEEK section shows MON 13/WED 15/THU 16 all COMPLETED (all are past/today — no future training days this week to verify UPCOMING label in UI, but backend test confirms no future event false-positives). Today tab loads correctly with Speed Lower session, exercises visible, ADD SET and LOG buttons functional.
rca_of_issue: BUG1 RCA: _generate_calendar_events() was calling same_type_this_week check without guarding against future dates. If a session type was logged earlier this week, ANY same-type session on a future date in the same week would also be marked completed. Fix: wrapped same_type_this_week check in 'if not is_future:'. BUG2 RCA: AsyncStorage was not persisting added sets (ADDED_SETS_KEY) and loggedSets re-sync was replacing rather than merging on mount. Fix: handleAddSet/handleRemoveSet now call saveAddedSetsToStorage; pendingAddedSets ref restores added sets after full rebuild; setLoggedSets now uses merge pattern (new Set(prev) + recovered.forEach).
